title: Is there a way to access all the global storage data for an app
excerpt: Hi, I have stored few junk data while developing apps. So i want to clear all those data is there a way to clear all data.

posts.author: shreeshaalek (shreesha)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have stored few junk data while developing apps. So i want to clear all those data is there a way to clear all data.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @shreeshaalek ,

You would need to delete each item in monday storage
